properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I've lived my life as others have done I've had some friends and I've had loved ones As the way of life goes, some have come and gone But here in my heart, I am not alone

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: See, I have this friend, one others can't see He walks with me and how He loves me So no matter what comes, what I have to bear I've strength to go on for He's always there

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I have no one, I still have someone When I have no hope, I still have one hope When heartaches sets in, I still have one friend Who let's me know, I am not alone For when I have no one, I still have someone

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: When sorrow still comes and pain lingers on God holds me close for He's that someone And when my spirits low, by His grace He shows I'm never alone when there's one who knows

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh when I have no one, I still have someone
